item.title: Cyjax's Top 10 of 2020 - CYJAX
item.description: Cyjax&#39;s Top 10 of 2020 - CYJAX

item.title: Dark Web Marketplaces 2026: Emerging Cybercrime Trends and Threats for CISOs - CYJAX
item.description: Dark web marketplaces continue to fuel cybercrime in 2026. This blog explores emerging trends, what threat actors are trading, and why dark web monitoring is essential for organisations.

item.title: Dark Web vs Deep Web: What’s the Difference and Why CISOs Should Care - CYJAX
item.description: Understanding the Deep Web and Dark Web is essential for CISOs navigating today’s threat landscape. This blog breaks down their differences, the risks they pose, and how intelligence-led monitoring helps organisations detect, prevent, and respond to cyber threats before they escalate.

item.title: DefacinGit - Defacement page templates hosted on GitHub - CYJAX
item.description: As explored in CYJAX’s recent blog, “PhishinGit – GitHub.io pages abused for malware distribution”, a core feature of GitHub is that it allows users to create and host free static webpages for repositories on github.io. Whilst this service is primarily used to display legitimate projects and host functional webpages, it is known to be used to host malicious files, infrastructure, and content.

item.title: CYJAX in 2025: A Year in Retrospect - CYJAX
item.description: 2025 was a defining year for CYJAX. With a bold rebrand, product innovation, and growing industry recognition, we strengthened our mission to empower organisations with analyst-enriched threat intelligence. This blog takes a retrospective look at CYJAX in 2025, a year that shaped our growth and direction.

item.title: CYJAX vs. SOC Radar: Different Approaches to Cyber Threat Intelligence - CYJAX
item.description: A detailed comparison of CYJAX and SOC Radar, exploring differences in automation, analyst-led investigations, RFIs, and intelligence depth to help security teams choose the right CTI platform.
